introSection: Mad Mouse was a hybrid Wild Mouse roller coaster built by UK manufacturer Maxwell previously located at Pleasureland Southport in Southport, Merseyside, England, UK. It moved to the park from Manning's Amusement Park in Felixstowe at the end of the 1982 season to make room for Wildcat.
fullText: Mad Mouse was a hybrid Wild Mouse roller coaster built by UK manufacturer Maxwell previously located at Pleasureland Southport in Southport, Merseyside, England, UK. It moved to the park from Manning's Amusement Park in Felixstowe at the end of the 1982 season to make room for Wildcat.
